nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in northern Naples, specifically Marano di Napoli.
Camorra clan; Raffaele Abbinante was originally affiliated with them.
Camorra clan led by Paolo Di Lauro, involved in drug trafficking and cigarette smuggling.
Splinter group from the Di Lauro clan; Francesco Abbinante sided with them.

edges.context: Raffaele Abbinante was originally an affiliate of the Nuvoletta clan.
The Abbinante brothers were top members of the Di Lauro drug trafficking group before joining the Spanish group.
Francesco Abbinante sided with the Scissionisti, a splinter group from the Di Lauro clan.
Guido Abbinante was the mastermind of over 50 murders during the feud with the rival Di Lauro clan.
